title: My Uncle
overview: Alia is an actress who lives in Rabat with her roommates, Leila and Hind. She's trying to make her way in the film world, with the hope of one day becoming a great actress. She receives a visit from her uncle Abderraouf, whom she hasn't seen in years. As time goes by, the relationship between the three young women and Abderraouf becomes increasingly difficult.
